title: lepidagathis subarmata
intro: Lepidagathis subarmata, also known as "wild sage" or "gulvel", is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lepidagathis subarmata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, which is used to treat various ailments, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
